Great question! We have two main volunteer paths: **Love Box volunteers** match with foster families to provide monthly support and mentorship, and **Dare to Dream mentors** work with youth ages 11-22 in foster care to build life skills and confidence.

Are you drawn more toward supporting families, or connecting one-on-one with a young person?

<<<ACTIONS ["love_box_learn","learn_dare_to_dream"]>>>
You're so welcome! 😊 I'm here if you have any other questions about Dare to Dream or anything else about our mentoring work. What would be most helpful to know next?

Great question! We have two main volunteer paths: **Love Box**, where you're matched with a foster family to provide monthly support and mentorship, and **Dare to Dream**, where you mentor a young person (ages 11-22) in foster care.

Are you drawn more to working with families, or would you prefer connecting one-on-one with a young person?

<<<ACTIONS ["love_box_learn","learn_dare_to_dream"]>>>

Great question! We have two main volunteer paths: **Love Box volunteers** who support foster families with monthly boxes and mentorship, and **Dare to Dream mentors** who work one-on-one with youth ages 11-22 in foster care.

Which of those sounds more interesting to you?

<<<ACTIONS ["love_box_learn","learn_dare_to_dream"]>>>

I love that you want to help! 💙 There are several meaningful ways to make a difference:

**Volunteering**
We have two core programs where you can walk alongside families and youth in foster care:

- **Love Box** — volunteer groups matched with a foster family, providing monthly Love Boxes, mentorship, and encouragement (12-month commitment)
- **Dare to Dream** — become a one-on-one mentor to a youth ages 11-22, meeting twice monthly (1-year commitment minimum)

Both require an application, background check (we cover the cost), and training. A great first step is attending a [Discovery Session](https://www.atlantaangels.org/discovery) — we host them throughout the month so you can learn about both programs and meet our team.

**Giving**
You can [make a donation](https://www.atlantaangels.org/donate) to support our work. We also have corporate partnerships and host an annual golf tournament.

**Learn More**
Head to [Get Involved](https://www.atlantaangels.org/get-involved) to explore everything in one place.

Are you leaning more toward volunteering your time, making a financial gift, or are you curious about both? 🤔

<<<ACTIONS ["general_giving","query_discoverysession"]>>>

We have two core programs where you can directly support families and youth in foster care.

- **Love Box** — volunteer groups matched with a foster family, providing monthly Love Boxes, mentorship, and encouragement over 12 months
- **Dare to Dream** — become a one-on-one mentor to a youth (ages 11-22), meeting twice a month for at least a year

Both require an application, background check (we cover the cost!), and training. A great first step is attending a [Discovery Session](https://www.atlantaangels.org/discovery) — we host them throughout the month so you can learn about both programs and meet our team. 🤝

**Other ways to give:**
- [Make a donation](https://www.atlantaangels.org/donate) to support our work
- Corporate partnerships
- Our annual golf tournament

You can explore everything at [Get Involved](https://www.atlantaangels.org/get-involved).

Both require an application, background check (we cover the cost), and training. A great first step is attending a [discovery session](https://www.atlantaangels.org/discovery) to learn more and meet our team! 🤝

**Giving**

You can [make a donation](https://www.atlantaangels.org/donate) to support our work, explore [other ways to give](https://www.atlantaangels.org/donate) like corporate partnerships, or join our annual golf tournament.

**Next Steps**
